2606.06390.title: HomeWorld: A Unified Floorplan-to-Furnished Framework for Generating Controllable, Densely Interactive Whole-Home Scenes
2606.06390.paper_summary: Indoor scene generation is crucial for robot simulation and modern interior design. However, complex layouts together with scarce 3D scene data make learning-based generation challenging. Existing methods often rely on hand-crafted rules or focus on isolated sub-tasks (e.g., floorplan synthesis or single-room furnishing), producing whole-home scenes that lack global coherence, realism, and simulation readiness. To mitigate these limitations, we propose a unified hierarchical framework that decomposes indoor scene synthesis into controllable stages. First, we curate a large-scale dataset of 300K real residential floorplans to train a large language model for whole-home floorplan generation. With detailed descriptions and a K-D tree-based representation, our method enables fine-grained, controllable whole-home floorplan generation. Building upon the generated whole-home floorplan, we leverage image generation models to draft furniture layouts from multi-level roaming viewpoints, and then generate the layouts of small manipulable objects on different supporting surfaces (e.g., cabinets, desks, and dining tables) for embodied AI simulation. During furniture and object layout generation, a VLM-based refiner iteratively corrects furniture and object placement, and a 3D generative model enables flexible replacement of individual assets. We further attach basic physical attributes and simple surface texture and lighting setups to complete the pipeline for embodied AI use. Experiments and user studies demonstrate that our pipeline produces indoor spaces with greater layout diversity and stronger 3D design appeal, outperforming prior methods on both quantitative and qualitative metrics. Finally, alongside our generation pipeline, we will release the floorplan dataset and 5K fully furnished scenes to the community. Project Page: https://kairos-homeworld.github.io/
2606.06390.paper_summary_zh: 室內場景生成對於機器人模擬和現代室內設計至關重要。<lb/>然而，複雜的佈局以及稀缺的 3D 場景數據使得基於學習的生成變得具有挑戰性。<lb/>現有的方法通常依賴手工製作的規則或專注於孤立的子任務（例如，平面圖合成或單間房間的家具擺放），生成的整體住宅場景缺乏全局一致性、現實感和模擬準備性。<lb/>為了減輕這些限制，我們提出了一個統一的層次框架，將室內場景合成分解為可控的階段。<lb/>首先，我們策劃了一個包含 30 萬個真實住宅平面圖的大型數據集，以訓練大型語言模型進行整體住宅平面圖生成。<lb/>通過詳細的描述和基於 K-D 樹的表示，我們的方法實現了細粒度、可控的整體住宅平面圖生成。<lb/>在生成的整體住宅平面圖的基礎上，我們利用圖像生成模型從多層次的漫遊視角草擬家具佈局，然後生成小型可操作物體在不同支撐表面（例如，櫃子、桌子和餐桌）上的佈局，以便於具身 AI 模擬。<lb/>在家具和物體佈局生成過程中，基於 VLM 的精煉器迭代地修正家具和物體的擺放，而 3D 生成模型則實現了單個資產的靈活替換。<lb/>我們進一步附加基本的物理屬性和簡單的表面材質及照明設置，以完成具身 AI 使用的管道。<lb/>實驗和用戶研究表明，我們的管道生成的室內空間具有更大的佈局多樣性和更強的 3D 設計吸引力，在定量和定性指標上均超越了先前的方法。<lb/>最後，除了我們的生成管道，我們還將向社區發布平面圖數據集和 5000 個完全裝修的場景。<lb/>項目頁面：https://kairos-homeworld.github.io/
2606.06390.author: Wenbo Li et.al.
2606.06390.authors: Wenbo Li, Xiaoliang Ju, Zipeng Qin, Rongyao Fang, Hongsheng Li
